name: Lead From the Front
description: Activating rank 2 of The Storm Voice grants you and group members within 28 meters Major Berserk and Major Protection (+10% damage done, -10% damage taken) for 1 second per 15 Ultimate spent.

name: Resolute Defense
description: Each second you remain Bracing, increase the damage you block by 6%, up to 5 times (30% total). Blocking damage has a 20% chance to restore 500 Stamina, once every block cost.

name: Wildfire Embers
description: When your Dragonknight damage over time effects end, apply Wildfire Embers to the target, dealing 2499 Flame Damage over 12 seconds. Stacks up to 12 times and gains +25% damage per stack.

name: Booming Voice
description: Activating rank 2 of The Storm Voice also grants 5 Health, Magicka and Stamina Recovery for every Ultimate spent for 10 seconds.

name: Inexorable Descent
description: Improves your Landslide passive to increase the potency of your damage done, healing done, and damage shield strength by 1% per stack.

name: Conservation of Energy
description: Upgrades rank 2 of Blood Magic to trigger with any ability that has a cost, restoring 400 Magicka and 389 Stamina (scales off Max Magicka/Stamina). Cost-per-tick abilities excluded.

name: Font of Power
description: Upgrades rank 2 of Exploitation to work with any Sorcerer ability and increases your Weapon and Spell Damage by 11% for 10 seconds. +1% per 1750 Max Magicka or Stamina (higher of the two).

name: Static Reverberation
description: When you deal damage, 1% chance per 1% of the target's missing Health to deal 747 Shock Damage (once every 0.2s). Chance is divided by 1 + every permanent pet you have active.

name: Calculated Defense
description: When beginning a Sorcerer or cast-time ability, gain a 0.5s shield absorbing 7127 damage (scales off Max Health). If it holds, you and nearby group members gain 3% Weapon and Spell Damage for 20 seconds.

name: Sphere of Influence
description: Casting a damage shield on yourself or an ally grants 150 Health, Magicka and Stamina Recovery and an additional shield absorbing up to 3239 damage for 4 seconds. Scales off the higher of Max Health or Max Magicka, capped at 25% of target's Max Health.

name: Nocturnal Inspiration
description: Upgrades rank 2 of Hemorrhage: each hit can generate 2 Ultimate (up to once every 0.3s), with a chance equal to your Weapon Critical chance.

name: An Eye for Exploitation
description: Increases your Weapon and Spell Damage by up to 1250 based on your target's missing Health. Reduces your damage taken by up to 12% based on your attacker's missing Health.

name: Above and Beyond
description: Increases your Critical Damage and Healing by 15% (halved against players). Raises your Critical Damage and Healing cap by 25% — from 125% to 150%.

name: Cutthroat's Focus
description: Activating a Nightblade ability while Bracing causes you to dodge attacks for 0.3 seconds. Each dodge increases your attacker's damage taken by 5% for 5 seconds.

name: Share the Spoils
description: Upgrades rank 2 of Transfer: grants the closest 4 group members 250 Magicka and Stamina and 1 Ultimate, and doubles the Ultimate you gain (4 instead of 2).

name: Bastion of Light
description: Sacred Ground now applies while in your own Nova and Spear Shards, and while Radial Sweep or Solar Barrage is active. While Sacred Ground is active, heal 1498 Health per second; gain 2 Ultimate if at full Health after the heal (in combat).

name: Devout Guardian
description: While Sacred Ground is active, gain a damage shield absorbing 3747 damage for 6 seconds (once every 6 seconds) with 300 Health, Magicka and Stamina Recovery while active. If the shield breaks, gain 10 Ultimate.

name: Bright Harbinger
description: Upgrades rank 2 of Illuminate: also grants Bright Harbinger for the duration, giving allies 300 Weapon and Spell Damage (doubled to 600 for you).

name: Judgment's Brand
description: When rank 2 of Burning Light deals damage, your Templar abilities gain 1250 damage done for 3.1 seconds (halved against players, 625).

name: Steadfast Candescence
description: Sacred Ground activates and refreshes itself while Bracing, increasing the amount of damage you can block by 20% while stationary.

name: Tundra's Maw
description: Applying Chill to an enemy also applies Major Brittle for 2 seconds, increasing their Critical Damage taken by 20%.

name: Wild Adaptation
description: Gain 333 Weapon and Spell Damage for each status effect on your target, up to 1665 (5 stacks). Can also apply when targeting friendly players.

name: Glacial Obstinance
description: Upgrades Bond with Nature to also trigger when casting Winter's Embrace abilities, granting 15% Weapon and Spell Damage for 10 seconds if you are at full Health after the heal.

name: Green-Keeper's Hide
description: Reduce your damage taken by 3% for every status effect active on your attacker, up to a maximum of 15% (5 status effects).

name: Bountiful Harvest
description: Upgrades rank 2 of Nature's Gift to grant the healed target Major Heroism for 4.5 seconds and restore an additional 250 Magicka and Stamina.

name: Cycle Unending
description: Upgrades rank 2 of Reusable Parts: grants Cycle Unending for 25 seconds, increasing your damage done by 1% per 1% Health advantage over the target, capping at 25% (12% vs players).

name: Pound of Flesh
description: When you take damage, 1% chance (up to once per second) to heal 2745 Health (scales off Max Health) and restore 5% missing Stamina. Chance increases by 1% per missing Health percent.

name: Veil's Forfeit
description: In combat, directly healing a target below 50% Health lets you use a corpse consuming ability on them for 10 seconds (once per second). Consuming or replacing this effect grants the target 2 Ultimate.

name: Nothing Wasted
description: Upgrades rank 2 of Corpse Consumption: each use grants a stack of Nothing Wasted for 10 seconds, increasing Max Health and Weapon/Spell Damage by 2% per stack (up to 10). Stacks decay 3 at a time.

name: Malevolent Promise
description: Upgrades rank 2 of Corpse Consumption: marks the closest non-player enemy with death's touch for 6 seconds, enabling corpse consuming abilities on them. Consuming or replacing this effect triggers rank 2 of Death Gleaning (once every 2 seconds).

name: Abyssal Emergence
description: Activating an Arcanist Ultimate immediately generates maximum Crux (3 stacks) and grants 666 Weapon and Spell Damage for 15 seconds.

name: Fate Realigned
description: Upgrades rank 2 of Implacable Outcome to generate maximum Crux (3), up to once every 15 seconds. After it triggers, gain 300 Weapon and Spell Damage for 25 seconds.

name: Unbound Potential
description: Upgrades rank 2 of Fated Fortune to also increase your damage done by 30% (halved against players) for the duration.

name: Erudite's Rigor
description: Upgrades Fatewoven Armor to also grant 300 Magicka and Stamina when you take damage, +100 per active Crux. Also grants 1 Ultimate. Once every 2 seconds.

name: Ink-Scribe's Verve
description: While in combat, when you heal or overheal a total of 75,000 Health, you generate a Crux.
